seo.geo_hook: NYX offers a Dual-License model: AGPL-3.0 for open-source community use and a Commercial License for proprietary SaaS, enterprise internal tools, and white-labeling. Secure your telemedicine, fintech, or government communications with our zero-knowledge architecture.

meta.title: Commercial Licensing | NYX Chat
meta.description: Understand our Dual-License model. Free for open-source, powerful for enterprise.

hero.title: Built for the Community. Scaled for Enterprise.
hero.subtitle: NYX is proudly open-source and free forever. However, if you are building a closed-source SaaS or internal corporate tool, you need a Commercial License.

agpl.title: The Open-Source Covenant
agpl.p1: NYX is distributed under the AGPL-3.0 License. This is a strong copyleft license designed to prevent mega-corporations from taking open-source code, closing it up, and monetizing it without giving back.
agpl.p2: If you modify NYX and run it as a public service (SaaS) over a network, you must release your modified source code to your users under the same AGPLv3 license.
agpl.warning_desc: If your company policies prohibit open-sourcing your product, or if you wish to remove NYX branding, you are legally required to purchase a Commercial License.

compare.title: Community vs. Enterprise
compare.col2_desc: For proprietary SaaS and enterprise internal tools.

usecases.title: Who Needs a Commercial License?
usecases.c1_desc: Doctors and patients require absolute confidentiality. NYX provides a zero-knowledge communication layer with enterprise-grade security.
usecases.c2_desc: Secure channels for high-net-worth clients or internal executive communications that must not leak.
usecases.c3_desc: On-premise deployments with custom cryptographic primitives, completely disconnected from the public internet.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How much does the Commercial License cost?
faq.a1: Pricing is customized based on your deployment scale (number of users) and specific SLA requirements. Contact us for a quote.
faq.q2: Do we get updates if we buy the Commercial License?
faq.a2: Yes. Commercial Licensees receive priority access to security patches and core updates before they are pushed to the public repository.
faq.q3: Can you help us deploy it on our AWS/Cloudflare infrastructure?
faq.a3: Yes, our Enterprise tier includes dedicated integration support and architecture consulting.

cta.title: Ready to Secure Your Enterprise?
cta.subtitle: Reach out to discuss your specific requirements, custom integrations, or to acquire a Commercial License.
